variantsSeverities.title: Variants × severities
variantsSeverities.description: variant: contained | outlined | text — default is contained.

fixedNumericSize.title: Fixed numeric size
fixedNumericSize.description: size as number sets width/height in px (icon-style control).

iconVariant.title: Icon variant
iconVariant.description: variant="icon" — use children or the icon prop.

iconButtonVariant.title: Icon button variant
iconButtonVariant.description: variant="icon-button" — square icon-only actions (common with severity="input").

labelProp.title: label prop
labelProp.description: Use label instead of children when you want a dedicated label slot.

icons.title: Icons
icons.description: leftIcon, rightIcon, or icon (replaces main content when set).

fullWidth.title: fullWidth
fullWidth.description: fullWidth stretches the button to the container width.

loading.title: Loading
loading.description: isLoading shows a spinner and disables interaction.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: disabled prevents clicks; pairs with isLoading.

tooltip.title: Tooltip
tooltip.description: tooltip wraps the button in a HoverCard; configure with tooltipOptions.

asChild.title: asChild
asChild.description: Merges styles onto a single child element (e.g. link styled as a button).

classNameStyle.title: className & style
classNameStyle.description: Extra Tailwind classes and inline styles merge with variants.

propsReference.title: Props reference
propsReference.content:
variant?: "contained" | "outlined" | "text" | "icon" | "icon-button"
severity?: "primary" | "secondary" | "success" | "warning" | "danger" | "info" | "input" | "muted"
size?: "xs" | "sm" | "md" | "lg" | "xl" | number
rounded?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" | "full" | "circle"
fullWidth?: boolean
icon?: ReactNode
label?: string
isLoading?: boolean
leftIcon?: ReactNode
rightIcon?: ReactNode
children?: ReactNode
disabled?: boolean
type?: "button" | "submit" | "reset"
onClick?: (e) => void
className?: string
style?: CSSProperties
tooltip?: string
tooltipOptions?: { openDelay?, closeDelay?, side?, align?, className?, sideOffset? }
asChild?: boolean
id?: string
